scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),cp=require('child_process'); function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name); if(e.isDirectory()) walk(p); else if(/\.js$/.test(e.name) && !/tools\//.test(p)) cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',p],{stdio:'inherit'});} } walk('.');"
